commit_scope: Admit host-io file_mtime/scan_run observation and scan_run JIT helper coverage to the fourth-arm manifest.

commands: coord claim "fourth-file-scan-carriers-floor: inspect and move the next carrier gaps around file_mtime / scan_run after ideas-graph-projection; avoid response-header, native-training, BML, witness, Android, and Postgres lanes"
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh hostio-observation go-jit-value-helper hostio-roundtrip write-file-text file-append
local_validation.notes: Focused gate returned PASS-4WAY for hostio-observation, go-jit-value-helper, hostio-roundtrip, write-file-text, and file-append. Full validation returned `fourth arm: 234 band(s) four-way` and `615 ok, 0 divergent`.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this fourth-arm host-io/JIT scan floor slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: fkwu now lowers file_mtime as tag 107 and scan_run as tag 108. hostio-observation proves real file freshness presence plus string scan stride four-way; go-jit-value-helper proves scan_run inside the JIT helper path four-way.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form runtime manifest admission
test_flows: cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh hostio-observation go-jit-value-helper hostio-roundtrip write-file-text file-append

phase_gate.gate: file_mtime and scan_run must cross fkwu before Postgres inherits the carrier floor.
phase_gate.next: Resolve Postgres carrier four-way, with broader source-scan recipes building on the admitted scan_run floor.

retuned_north_star: file_mtime and scan_run moved to supported as host-io observation floor
JIT scan helper moved to supported
next carrier gate narrowed to Postgres; broader source-scan recipes build on scan_run
blocked_trials: Initial emitted C used #include <sys/stat.h>, which failed Android target-object audit without an Android sysroot.
Emitter now uses real st_mtime when sys/stat.h is available and a compile-safe positive existence floor when the Android cross target lacks that header.

macos_android_evidence.android_floor: Android remains supported at the minimum Form-native recipe/table, target-object, and ELF executable-shape floor in this slice. Shipping a clang-like compiler binary inside the APK remains optional future acceleration/oracle work; this commit does not require that binary for the supported JIT floor.
